# discord_scheduled_event (Resource)

Manages a scheduled event within a Discord guild.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# External event (entity_type 3) hosted at a location.
resource "discord_scheduled_event" "meetup" {
  server_id            = "123456789012345678"
  name                 = "Community Meetup"
  description          = "Monthly hangout for members."
  entity_type          = 3
  scheduled_start_time = "2026-07-01T18:00:00Z"
  scheduled_end_time   = "2026-07-01T20:00:00Z"
  location             = "https://meet.example.com/community"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `entity_type` (Number) Type of the event: 1 (stage instance), 2 (voice), or 3 (external).
- `name` (String) Name of the event.
- `scheduled_start_time` (String) ISO 8601 timestamp at which the event starts.
- `server_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the guild.

### Optional

- `channel_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the channel the event is hosted in (required for stage and voice events).
- `description` (String) Description of the event.
- `location` (String) Location of an external event (maps to `entity_metadata.location`).
- `privacy_level` (Number) Privacy level of the event (2 = guild only).
- `scheduled_end_time` (String) ISO 8601 timestamp at which the event ends (required for external events).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Snowflake ID of the scheduled event.
- `status` (Number) Status of the event: 1 (scheduled), 2 (active), 3 (completed), 4 (cancelled).
